author: SypherPK
text:
Using AI Glasses to CHEAT in Fortnite...
Fortnite players have been using gadgets, softwares, and cheats over the years to try to gain competitive advantages, but there's one thing they've never tried... so today, I tested 2 of the most popular pairs of AI glasses to find out if they could help me win in Fortnite! Enjoy!
